headlines.description: Brentford striker Yoane Wissa netted a brace as his side twice came from behind to grab a 3-2 home win over Bournemouth in a rip-roaring mid-table Premier League clash on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wissa brace helps Brentford to win vs. B'mouth

headlines.description: Fulham cruised to a 2-0 victory over Crystal Palace at Selhurst Park in the Premier League on Saturday with goals from Emile Smith Rowe and Harry Wilson while the home side were reduced to 10 men when Daichi Kamada saw red for a dangerous tackle.
headlines.shortLinkText: Smith Rowe, Wilson shine in Fulham win vs. Palace

headlines.description: Everton ground out a point in a 0-0 draw at West Ham United on Saturday in a Premier League game in which neither side did enough to justify three points.
headlines.shortLinkText: Everton grind out point at West Ham in stalemate

headlines.description: Wolverhampton Wanderers' fastest goal in their Premier League history from Pablo Sarabia set up a long-awaited victory as they beat fellow strugglers Southampton 2-0 on Saturday to move off the bottom of the table.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wolves bare teeth and sink Southampton for first win

events.name: Manchester City at Brighton & Hove Albion

headlines.description: Manchester City lost 2-1 to Brighton & Hove Albion in the Premier League on Saturday, thanks to late goals from substitutes Joao Pedro and Matt O'Riley that gave the champions their fourth consecutive loss in all competitions.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brighton condemn Man City to 4th straight loss

headlines.description: Liverpool opened a five-point lead at the top of the Premier League as breakaway goals by Darwin Núñez and Mohamed Salah sealed a 2-0 win at home to Aston Villa on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Liverpool go 5 points clear with win over Villa
